'''Insta-7''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Insta system/Legends|Insta system]] where a warrant was issued for the arrest of [[Glott]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[River of Chaos 3|''River of Chaos'' 3]] {{1stm}}
